problem id: 07d61ec8
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) XOR NOT SHL(2)) OR SHR(2)

examples:
  10111101 -> 01111111
  11011001 -> 00111110
  00001010 -> 11000011
  01011001 -> 00111111
  11110001 -> 11111100
  11111011 -> 11111110
  10110001 -> 01111100
  10100110 -> 00101011
  11011110 -> 00111111

query: 01100011
predicted answer: 10111101
